text:
Zem (ゼム, Zemu) was a Chimera Ant Squadron Leader killed by the Extermination Team. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 21, Chapter 205 

Personality

Not much is known about Zem's personality; however, he was said to have gotten especially cocky after learning Nen. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 20, Chapter 204 

Plot

Chimera Ant arc

Baital orders Zem and Pokoro's units to follow his own unit in crane formation. 

Abilities & Powers

Being a Squadron Leader, Zem is physically stronger than any average human; or, presumably, Chimera Ant soldier. According to his hierarchical position, he has authority over 4-5 officers and several dozen peon soldiers. His body was considerably durable, since a punch from a Nen-using Rammot Hunter × Hunter - Volume 19, Chapter 198 did not appear to have inflicted any visible injury or damage on him.

Nen

After being violently "initiated", Zem learned Nen or at least became able to perceive aura (like Morel's transmuted smog). 

Manga Appearances

Trivia

In Crunchyroll's translation of the 2011 anime adaptation, the character's name is "Zemu". Hunter × Hunter - Episode 88 (2011)
